tags.description: The men’s restroom has been broken for a while, so the building management decided to change the woman’s toilet into a unisex restroom, with the sign saying “Woman”, with “and Men” etched underneath.

tags.operator: The Department of Parks and Recreation
City and County of Honolulu Parks and ecreation

tags.description: Restrooms are located on the outside of Black Rock Cafe.
The restroom is located on the side of the convience store.
Toilets are located on the bottom level of the indoor corridor inside the retail building. Toilets can be accessed through a double door entrance, or by Down to Earth customers using a "back door".
Restrooms are located inside of an indoor corridor located next to Restaurant Osaka. Although this toilet is operated by the restaurant, customers from any tenant of this building are allowed.
The toilets are available to all customers of the Waiakea Center.

tags.note: Temporaily closed to customers during the COVID-19 Pandemic

tags.operator: City and County of Honolulu Department of Parks and Recreation
